campaign_routes.label: LUNAR PEACEKEEPERS
campaign_routes.description: The official MoonGoons Take Back story route. Follow the Breakwater dispatches in order.

campaign_routes.label: THE SYNDICATE
campaign_routes.description: Reserved for the future playable Syndicate campaign.

campaign_routes.label: THE NULLBORN
campaign_routes.description: Reserved for the future playable Nullborn campaign.

difficulties.label: EASY
difficulties.description: Slower enemy response, weaker forces, and reduced Syndicate funding.

difficulties.label: MEDIUM
difficulties.description: The intended story pressure and baseline enemy strength.

difficulties.label: HARD
difficulties.description: Faster raids, stronger enemies, and a better-funded Syndicate.

operations.title: First Light Dispatch
operations.briefing: Reopen the lunar precinct after a Syndicate blackout. Establish a working economy and dismantle the first hidden command relay.
operations.objective: Destroy the Syndicate Hideout before the Command Nexus falls.

operations.title: Cold Ledger
operations.briefing: Trace missing resource allocations through a fractured mining district. Secure Alloy flows before the Syndicate can fund a heavier assault.
operations.objective: Secure Gravity Foundry, establish a Forward Relay, then destroy the Hideout.

operations.title: Signal Theft
operations.briefing: Syndicate crews are spoofing Peacekeeper dispatch channels. Use relays and patrol routes to expose the false signal lattice.
operations.objective: Capture two sectors, disrupt Siphon funding, then destroy the Hideout.

operations.title: Glassline Stand
operations.briefing: A breach column is moving along the Transit Lane. Hold the choke points long enough to reclaim the district’s communications spine.
operations.objective: Use terrain and Forward Relays to contain the Syndicate, then dismantle the Hideout.

operations.title: Breakwater Zero
operations.briefing: The first Syndicate command pocket is about to harden into a permanent lunar fortress. Break its relay network before Ghost Protocol reaches full deployment.
operations.objective: Survive the escalated doctrine pressure and destroy the fortified Hideout.
